name: python3-brotli
title: python3-brotli
summary: lossless compression algorithm and format (Python 3 version)
description:
lossless compression algorithm and format (Python 3 version)
Brotli is a generic-purpose lossless compression algorithm
that compresses data using a combination of a modern variant
of the LZ77 algorithm, Huffman coding and 2nd order context modeling,
with a compression ratio comparable to the best currently available
general-purpose compression methods. It is similar in speed with
deflate but offers more dense compression.
.
This package installs a Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-brotli because lossless compression algorithm and format (Python 3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-brotli as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-brotli with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-brotli --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
